strengths: Clear navigation structure with 4 main tabs
All necessary information visible at once
weaknesses: Low visual hierarchy - header blends with content
Preview area too small and lacks visual impact
Information density is high - can feel cluttered
Limited contrast between UI elements and background

header.title: NOVA1492
header.subtitle: 당신만의 로봇을 커스터마이즈하세요
issues: Header lacks visual separation from content area
No utility actions visible (search, settings, notifications)
suggestions: Add background color/gradient to create section separation
Add search and settings icons in top right
Consider adding user profile or currency display

issues: Tab design is standard but lacks visual personality
Active state feedback could be stronger
suggestions: Add icons to each tab for better recognition
Consider bottom navigation with larger touch targets
Add active tab underline or background highlight

contentArea.layout: List on left, Detail on right, Preview in center
issues: Three-column layout on mobile would be problematic
Preview area is too small and gets lost
List and detail panels compete for attention
suggestions: Consider responsive: List -> Detail -> Preview pattern
Or: Preview (large) with overlay detail panel
Add tab or toggle to switch between list/detail views

issues: Too small to appreciate the model
suggestions: Make preview larger and more prominent
Add 360° rotation support with gesture indication
Add background effects (gradient, lighting, particles)
Consider fullscreen preview mode

issues: All items look identical when not selected
Stats are hard to compare at a glance
No indication of which items are owned/locked
suggestions: Add progress bars or visual indicators for stats
Add rarity/color coding for different item tiers
Add lock icon for unowned items
Show comparison arrows for stat differences

issues: Lacks visual hierarchy - all stats same weight
No action buttons visible in screenshot
Could benefit from more visual organization
suggestions: Group related stats (offense, defense, utility)
Add action buttons: [Equip], [Compare], [Details]
Use visual scale/bars for stats
Add upgrade path or max level indicator

improvementProposals.title: Enhance Preview Area
improvementProposals.description: Make the 3D preview the hero element of the screen
changes: Increase preview size to 40-50% of screen
Add interactive rotation with gesture hint
Add background gradient and lighting effects

improvementProposals.title: Improve Visual Hierarchy
improvementProposals.description: Create clear separation between UI sections
changes: Add distinct background colors for header vs content

improvementProposals.title: Add Visual Stat Representation
improvementProposals.description: Make stats easier to understand at a glance
changes: Replace text stats with progress bars/gauges
Add comparison indicators when selecting items
Show stat deltas relative to equipped item

improvementProposals.title: Add Interactive Feedback
changes: Add hover states for all interactive elements
Add transition animations for state changes
Add ripple or scale effects on tap

improvementProposals.title: Enhance Navigation
changes: Add haptic feedback on tab switch

alternative2.name: Tabbed Detail
alternative2.description: List view with detail in separate tab

alternative3.name: Card Grid
alternative3.description: Grid of cards with expandable detail

usSuggestions: Use .preview-container with background-gradient for visual depth
Use .stat-bar with width transition for smooth stat changes
Use .selected-item with border-left and background highlight
Use uss-transition for smooth state changes
componentOpportunities: CoreListItem: Reusable list item with name, level, stats
StatBar: Visual bar with value and percentage
TabButton: Tab with icon, label, and active state

acceptanceCriteria: Preview area is prominent (at least 30% of screen)
Selected item has clear visual distinction (border, background, or glow)
Stats are visually represented (bars, not just text)
All interactive elements have hover/active states
Responsive layout works on target aspect ratios
nextSteps: Create UI Toolkit UXML structure based on suggestions
Define USS style variables for color palette
Add stat bar component with animations
Test on target resolutions and devices
